commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Human review should gate the security-boundary repair, compatibility policy choice, and required contributor proof before merge.; Needs attention: The patch weakens the workspace avatar file-read boundary by replacing the existing opened-fd data-URI read with a path read after validation.; Review finding: [P1] Keep avatar data-URI reads on a root-safe file descriptor — src/agents/identity-avatar.ts:151 (sha=f27ab043c88814a935e58f37f33568c3eb229449)
commands.review_summary:
The PR moves workspace-relative agent avatar data-URI projection into `src/agents/identity-avatar.ts`, reuses it from `agent.identity.get`, `agents.list`, and Control UI bootstrap, and updates Personal-card avatar tests.

PR surface: Source -12, Tests +126. Total +114 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main can return `/avatar/<agentId>` from `agent.identity.get` for workspace-relative avatars while the Control UI avatar route requires read authorization; no live browser session was run in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review should gate the security-boundary repair, compatibility policy choice, and required contributor proof before merge.
